name: Bacon-Cream Cheese Pinwheels
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cooked bacon (8-10 strips), finely chopped
3 slices pullman loaf bread, cut 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the softened butter and barbecue sauce in a blender; set aside.
2. Blend the cream cheese and bacon thoroughly.
3. Trim the crusts from the bread slices. Flatten slightly with a rolling pin.
4. Spread a thin, even layer of the butter mixture on each bread slice.
5. Spread about 1 cup of the cream cheese-bacon mixture onto each bread slice.
6. Cut each bread slice in half crosswise.
7. Roll the bread gently, jellyroll fashion. Wrap the rolls in foil and freeze for at least 2 hours.
8. Cut the rolls into 1/2-inch-wide slices.
9. Thaw the rolls, arrange on a platter, and serve chilled. Makes 36.
